arts.ttl: Andres Iniesta to retire as Barcelona and Spain icon picks date he will walk away
arts.sum: Andres Iniesta, a four-time Champions League winner who scored the winning goal in the 2010 World Cup final, is set to hang up his boots 24 years on from his professional debut

arts.ttl: World Cup winning Barcelona player that typified Guardiola era announces retirement
arts.sum: When you think of the Pep Guardiola era at Barcelona, the names that readily spring to mind are those of Lionel Messi, Xavi and Andres Iniesta. All three, in different ways, typified what will always be remembered as Barca’s golden era. arts.ttl: Why is Marc-Andre Ter Stegen not playing for Barcelona today against Young Boys in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Barcelona are aiming to put their Champions League slip-up against Monaco behind them as they take on BSC Young Boys ( Tuesday October 1, 2024, 3:00 p.m. ET/12 noon PT .) in match day two. Who will Barcelona sign to replace Marc-Andre Ter Stegen?

arts.ttl: Barca told Szczesny will need ‘three or four weeks’ of training to be ready
arts.sum: Barcelona have been told that goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny will need “three of four weeks” to return to full match fitness after coming out of retirement. “Although 34 is not an age for a goalkeeper, Wojciech will certainly need three or four weeks of training to get back to his pre-retirement condition.

Speaking ahead of Tuesday's 9pm CEST kick-off against Young Boys, FC Barcelona coach Hansi Flick commented that although the Swiss side has not started their season very well, "we have seen that they have good players and that they are strong on the counter ... The Champions League continues for FC Barcelona this week with a game at home to Young Boys of Switzerland.
